targetDate.title: Target date
targetDate.description: Date to fetch filings for (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today (US/Mountain).

supabaseServiceKey.title: Supabase service role key
supabaseServiceKey.description: Supabase service role key (not the anon key).

calibrationMode.title: Calibration mode
calibrationMode.description: Dumps the first 5 raw API records to the dataset without upserting.

dryRun.title: Dry run
dryRun.description: Parse and normalise but do NOT upsert to Supabase.
